title: 将 VHD 挂载到主机
title_en: Mount a VHD onto the Host
code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$vhd = 'C:\Temp\WMITEST_mount.vhdx'
$ims = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ImageManagementService

# 1) 创建一个用于挂载的动态 vhdx
$sd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData").CreateInstance()
$sd.Type = [uint16]3      # 3 = 动态
$sd.Format = [uint16]3    # 3 = VHDX
$sd.Path = $vhd
$sd.MaxInternalSize = [uint64](64MB)
$rc = $ims.CreateVirtualHardDisk($sd.GetText(1))   # 仅传入 IN 参数;不要为 OUT 的 Job 传入 $null
if($rc.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rc.Job | Out-Null }

# 2) AttachVirtualHardDisk 等价于 Mount-VHD,以环回方式挂载到主机。参数: Path, AssignDriveLetter, ReadOnly
$r = $ims.AttachVirtualHardDisk($vhd, $false, $false)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }

# 3) 通过 GetMountedStorageImage 校验(CriterionType 0 = 按路径查询) -> Msvm_MountedStorageImage
$img = $null
$g = $ims.GetMountedStorageImage($vhd, [uint16]0)
if($g.ReturnValue -eq 0 -and $g.Image){ $img = [wmi]$g.Image }
if(-not $img){ $img = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_MountedStorageImage | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq $vhd -or $_.Path -eq $vhd } | Select-Object -First 1 }
"mounted Type=$($img.Type) Access=$($img.Access)"   # Type 0=VHD 1=ISO ; Access 1=只读 2=读写

# 4) DetachVirtualHardDisk 是 Msvm_MountedStorageImage 的实例方法(非服务上的方法)
$d = $img.DetachVirtualHardDisk()
if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null }

Remove-Item $vhd -Force
code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$vhd = 'C:\Temp\WMITEST_mount.vhdx'
$ims = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ImageManagementService

# 1) Create a dynamic vhdx to be mounted
$sd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData").CreateInstance()
$sd.Type = [uint16]3      # 3 = dynamic
$sd.Format = [uint16]3    # 3 = VHDX
$sd.Path = $vhd
$sd.MaxInternalSize = [uint64](64MB)
$rc = $ims.CreateVirtualHardDisk($sd.GetText(1))   # Pass only IN parameters; do not pass $null for the OUT Job
if($rc.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rc.Job | Out-Null }

# 2) AttachVirtualHardDisk is equivalent to Mount-VHD, mounting to the host via loopback. Parameters: Path, AssignDriveLetter, ReadOnly
$r = $ims.AttachVirtualHardDisk($vhd, $false, $false)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }

# 3) Verify via GetMountedStorageImage (CriterionType 0 = query by path) -> Msvm_MountedStorageImage
$img = $null
$g = $ims.GetMountedStorageImage($vhd, [uint16]0)
if($g.ReturnValue -eq 0 -and $g.Image){ $img = [wmi]$g.Image }
if(-not $img){ $img = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_MountedStorageImage | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq $vhd -or $_.Path -eq $vhd } | Select-Object -First 1 }
"mounted Type=$($img.Type) Access=$($img.Access)"   # Type 0=VHD 1=ISO ; Access 1=read-only 2=read/write

# 4) DetachVirtualHardDisk is an instance method of Msvm_MountedStorageImage (not a method on the service)
$d = $img.DetachVirtualHardDisk()
if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null }

Remove-Item $vhd -Force
output:
attachRv=4096 verifyMounted=True mountType=0 mountAccess=2 detachRv=0 stillMountedAfterDetach=False fileRemoved=True
RESULT=PASS
notes: AttachVirtualHardDisk(Path, AssignDriveLetter, ReadOnly) 定义于 Msvm_ImageManagementService,等价于 Mount-VHD,以环回方式挂载到主机。返回 4096 表示异步作业,经 Wait-Job2 等待 JobState 完成即成功。
DetachVirtualHardDisk 是 Msvm_MountedStorageImage 的无参实例方法,而非服务上的方法;卸载对象为该次 Attach 得到的挂载镜像。返回 0 表示同步完成。
定位挂载对象可优先使用服务方法 GetMountedStorageImage(SelectionCriterion, CriterionType),CriterionType=0 按路径查询,OUT 参数名为 Image(REF);也可直接枚举 Msvm_MountedStorageImage 并按 Name/Path 匹配。
Msvm_MountedStorageImage 的关键读回属性:Type(0=Virtual Hard Disk,1=ISO Image)、Access(1=Read-only,2=Read/Write)。键为 SCSI 地址(PortNumber/PathId/TargetId/Lun)。
CreateVirtualHardDisk 仅接受 1 个 IN 参数(内嵌的 VHDSettingData 串);若为 OUT 的 Job 传入 $null 会触发 MethodCountCouldNotFindBest 错误。使用 Get-WmiObject 调用方法时不应显式传递 OUT 参数。
此操作挂载到主机而非某台虚拟机,因此全程不创建任何虚拟机;清理仅需 Detach 后删除 vhdx 文件。
AttachVirtualHardDisk / Msvm_MountedStorageImage / DetachVirtualHardDisk 自 build 9200 起持续提供。
notes_en: AttachVirtualHardDisk(Path, AssignDriveLetter, ReadOnly) is defined on Msvm_ImageManagementService, is equivalent to Mount-VHD, and mounts to the host via loopback. A return value of 4096 indicates an asynchronous job; success is confirmed by awaiting JobState completion with Wait-Job2.

DetachVirtualHardDisk is a parameterless instance method of Msvm_MountedStorageImage, not a method on the service; the object it detaches is the mounted image produced by that Attach. A return value of 0 indicates synchronous completion.

To locate the mounted object, the service method GetMountedStorageImage(SelectionCriterion, CriterionType) is preferred, with CriterionType=0 to query by path and the OUT parameter named Image (REF); alternatively, enumerate Msvm_MountedStorageImage directly and match on Name/Path.
Key read-back properties of Msvm_MountedStorageImage: Type (0=Virtual Hard Disk, 1=ISO Image), Access (1=Read-only, 2=Read/Write). The key is the SCSI address (PortNumber/PathId/TargetId/Lun).

CreateVirtualHardDisk accepts only 1 IN parameter (the embedded VHDSettingData string); passing $null for the OUT Job triggers a MethodCountCouldNotFindBest error. OUT parameters should not be passed explicitly when invoking the method through Get-WmiObject.
This operation mounts to the host rather than to any virtual machine, so no virtual machine is created at any point; cleanup only requires detaching and then deleting the vhdx file.
AttachVirtualHardDisk / Msvm_MountedStorageImage / DetachVirtualHardDisk have been continuously available since build 9200.
